title: Add "Info" to Groups
excerpt: At the top of the board view, there’s an (i)nfo icon with preview text and a “See More” link where you can store a board description. We’d love to be able to set descriptions for each group to aide in user navigation. We…

posts.author: CReilly (Christina Reilly)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the top of the board view, there’s an (i)nfo icon with preview text and a “See More” link where you can store a board description. We’d love to be able to set descriptions for each group to aide in user navigation. We have a lot of automations built in, so being able to orient new users as they use the board would be hugely beneficial.

Example below shows the “Requests” board with a group for “New Requests.” The (i)nfo icon, preview text, and “See More” link format from next to “Requests” at the top was applied to “New Requests” group header:

Monday Suggestion724×272 16.9 KB

posts.author: D.Red (devonred@umich.edu)
posts.cookedHtml: @CReilly’s solution seems like a pretty elegant one. I wonder if any devs saw this?
